message:
Refactor cache directory structure and project hashing

Directory Structure Change:
- Before: /tmp/rch/{project}_{hash}/
- After:  /tmp/rch/{project}/{hash}/

This hierarchical structure provides:
- Better organization when multiple cache versions exist per project
- Easier manual inspection and debugging
- Cleaner cleanup when removing all caches for a specific project

Enhanced Cleanup Logic:
- Two-level iteration: first project directories, then hash subdirectories
- Track active caches per project during cleanup
- Automatically remove empty project directories after cleaning stale hashes
- Improved error handling with graceful continuation on failures
- Better logging for cleanup operations

Hash Algorithm Improvement:
- Replace DefaultHasher with blake3 for project hash computation
- Hash format: 16-character hex string (was 16-char hex from u64)
- Include Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock modification times as nanoseconds
  since UNIX epoch for deterministic hashing across sessions
- blake3 provides faster hashing and better distribution than DefaultHasher

Cache Path Function:
- cache_path() now builds nested path: CACHE_BASE/project/hash
- Updated tests to verify new path structure

These changes improve cache maintainability and provide consistent
hashing between hook (rch) and worker (rch-wkr) components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
